class starry_unigraph.backends.flare.RNNStateManager(ends_list: list[int | None], mode: str = 'pad', disable_routes: bool = False)[source]

Bases: object

Per-snapshot RNN state storage with padding / mixing support.

Mirrors FlareDTDG’s RNNStateManager exactly.

add(g: Any) → None[source]
classmethod apply_state(fn, state: Any, old_state: Any | None = None) → Any[source]

classmethod state_padding(state: Any, end: int) → Any[source]

class starry_unigraph.backends.flare.STGraphBlob(state: RNNStateManager)[source]

Bases: object

Sequence of DGL graphs with attached RNN state management.

In training: backed by RNNStateManager (multi-frame, state padding/mixing). In eval/predict: wraps a single graph (dummy state methods).

property current_graph: Any
describe() → dict[str, Any][source]
property flare_is_full_snapshot: bool
property snapshot_index: int
